data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for family package pricing, but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. While the linked use case mentions a family having a '10 swim lessons' package shared across all members, there is no direct evidence or API interaction that demonstrates how this shared pool pricing is implemented or validated. This leads to a clear gap in coverage regarding the requirement for family package pricing.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of family package pricing (shared pool).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify family package pricing functionality.
